title: System Rollouts
description: Thin rollout console for required system plugins, governance incidents, and the current host-controlled release path.

empty.selectCompany: Select a company to view rollout context.

sections.rolloutsDescription: Latest controlled restart-path rollouts for required system plugins.
sections.requiredPluginsDescription: Health and lifecycle state for core-managed system plugins.

execution.title: Execution Path
execution.description: Current rollout behavior for system capabilities.
execution.note: True live/candidate slot rollout stays out of Phase A until host prerequisites exist.

plugins.title: Required Plugins
plugins.description: Execution Improvement and Skills System are installed as required system plugins.
plugins.note: Use the plugin manager to inspect health, version, and limited runtime settings.

incidents.title: Governance Queue
incidents.description: Critical rollout and recovery decisions still route through the shared system issues project.
incidents.note: Execution incidents, skill gaps, and governance blockers remain visible before any rollout approval.
